value:
echo "ares orchestrator queue dispatcher starting" >&2
while true; do
  OP_REQUEST=$(RUST_LOG=error ares ops claim-next --timeout 30 2>/dev/null | tail -n 1 || true)
  case "$OP_REQUEST" in *"\"operation_id\""*) ;; *) OP_REQUEST="" ;; esac
  if [ -n "$OP_REQUEST" ]; then
    OP_ID=$(printf '%s\n' "$OP_REQUEST" | sed -n 's/.*"operation_id"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p')
    if [ -z "$OP_ID" ]; then
      echo "Skipping malformed op request" >&2
      continue
    fi
    echo "Starting operation: $OP_ID" >&2
    export ARES_OPERATION_ID="$OP_REQUEST"
    ares orchestrator
    status=$?
    echo "Operation $OP_ID exited with status $status" >&2
  fi
done
